sourcePdf: owner-supplied official PDF export; not committed because the source page chrome may contain account identity
scope: Only standard voice_type rows explicitly under the official Doubao Voice Synthesis Model 2.0 heading. ICL, Model 1.0, and end-to-end S2S entries are excluded.

emotionPolicy.note: No Model 2.0 fixed emotion enum, field location, intensity range, or per-voice compatibility is supplied by the exported voice-list PDF. Do not pass an emotion field until a separate official API reference verifies it.

voices.supportedLanguages: 中文、日文、印尼、墨西哥西班牙语 方言：四川、陕西、东北
